biological_replicate: individuals with high amount of brain IAPP levels show significantly lower capillary diameter
technical_replicate: HBVP were grown in poly-L-lysine (ScienCell #0413) coated 12-well plates in 3 replicates
experimental_design: the individuals were divided into two groups: high (n=4) and low (n=4) IAPP levels.
factor_value: the individuals were divided into two groups: high (n=4) and low (n=4) IAPP levels.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
